title: Dark mode
description: The BEST Dark Mode Resource Pack for Minecraft Java Edition.
body:
![How the resource pack looks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9wyd4FMB/images/a62293e5fb27cf2c7d51cb4f1ff89ee62d8ca7ec.png)


# Dark mode resource pack, the best one there is.

 **__Dark Mode__** gives the Minecraft GUI a **__darker look__** while maintaining the **__vanilla__** textures.


## Mods supported
 
| Mod                                                                                                                                                 | Supported         |                                                                 
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|:---------------:|         
|[ClothConfig](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)                                                        | ✅                     | 
|[Mod menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)                                                               | ✅                     | 
|[Request more mods!](https://github.com/Batmangy/Dark-mode/issues)                         |**<--- Request here!**                  |
